title: Create: Divine Lime
description: This mod adds a recipe for blue and lime dye using the create mod!
body:
![Create: Divine *lime*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b44493b345815159b43a5e3628a9bd184417fbb.png)

# Create: Divine Lime
This mod adds some recipies for crafting dye in minecraft with the create mod!
Right now, you can make blue and lime dye.

**I would recommend using EMI or REI.**

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f53ce0aba973fbcb33b9f61b9523c29d5b9eb3d.png)
